gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students who line up outside the university gym clutch resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, all surrounding dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students who line up outside the university gym clutch resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, all surrounding dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
